questions: What does adding a seed target touch?
Is the scaffold-owned pinning a constraint?

findings.summary: LF-canonical hashing shipped Phases 156-158; autocrlf acceptance holds; residual is seed-level .gitattributes only
SeedTarget file-mode + template is the whole mechanism; _write_file_if_missing gives idempotency free
SCAFFOLD_OWNED derives from SEED_TARGETS and the pinning test locks equality, not the literal set -- self-consistent
repo root has no .gitattributes; self-application adds the stanza (blobs already LF)
